Jacobs Hall subnet gateways to new router hardware. This is being done because the current hardware is end-of-life, and also as part of a project to refresh Jacobs Hall networks to the current campus standard. The following networks will be affected:

heduled). [Read more…] about June IRIS Server Patching On Wednesday, June 4th, between 10AM and 12PM, we will be replacing the Ethernet switches in the Cory 165 server room. The current switches have reached the end of their useful life, and with the

reached the end of their useful life, and with the newer hardware we can begin to provide some limited 10G connectivity. All systems in Cory 165 will experience a brief interruption in network connectivity, typically less than one minute, as connecti

ivity, typically less than one minute, as connections are moved to the new switches. No action should be necessary, but a reboot may help if you notice any issues afterwards. Update 6/4 11:32: This work has been completed. Please contact us at help@e

rk has been completed. Please contact us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you notice any ongoing issues. We are scheduling a NetApp ONTAP upgrade, to apply a necessary update to our NetApp fileserver, from 8am to 12pm on Saturday, May 24, 2025 . All Home

m 8am to 12pm on Saturday, May 24, 2025 . All Home directories and Project shares (CIFS/SMB and NFS) may experience disconnection during the update that may cause data loss on active, open files. Please close your open files and save them before Sat

ase close your open files and save them before Saturday morning. Services (e.g. webservice) that depend on this storage will also be temporarily down or unresponsive. When maintenance is completed, NFS clients should automatically resume normal opera

S clients should automatically resume normal operation, but a reboot should help if they don’t. CIFS clients (such as Windows and MacOS) may need to remount filesystems, or simply be rebooted. [Read more…] about NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Saturda

ore…] about NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Saturday May 24, 2025 The EECS Mailing List server lists.eecs.berkeley.edu is experiencing some problems after recent patching. At this time, scheduled tasks such as syncing list membership from external so
